title: Personal Center
description: View and edit your profile and account security settings

security.title: Account Security
security.desc: Manage two-factor verification to protect against password leaks
security.totpEnabledDesc: Enabled. {{count}} recovery codes remaining. Sign-in will require a 6-digit code from your authenticator.
security.totpDisabledDesc: Not enabled. We recommend pairing Google / Microsoft Authenticator / 1Password etc. so a leaked password alone cannot sign you in.
security.bindDescription: Scan the QR with any TOTP authenticator (Google / Microsoft / 1Password etc.) and enter the 6-digit code shown to finish setup.
security.unbindDescription: Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator to confirm. After disabling, sign-in will no longer require a second factor.
security.recoveryWarningBody: Each of the 10 codes below can be used once if you lose your authenticator. They will not be shown again — screenshot or copy them to a password manager.
security.confirmCodeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator

profile.title: Profile
profile.loadError: Failed to load. Please try again.
profile.changeAvatarDesc: Select or upload an avatar from resource manager

validation.newPasswordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters
validation.newPasswordMax: New password must be at most 20 characters
